_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the generic-exit-code scenario (job-stopped-generic-exit-code playbook). The job Info shows only the raw CLR code 0xE0434352; the REAL cause (an unhandled System.Collections.Generic.KeyNotFoundException) is recovered from job traces. The agent chains: folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get (Info: exit code 0xE0434352) -> jobs logs (raw code, note about old robot) -> jobs traces (KeyNotFoundException at 'Lookup region total') -> machines list (robot 23.4.0). Keys are stable.

rules._doc: Proxy any docsai query to the real uip CLI; cache in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
